summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification. The preflight artifact reports no security-sensitive hydrated job refs, merge/fix/low-signal closeout are disabled, and the shard is not a dedupe cluster. Open hydrated PRs are kept as independent inventory items unless already closed; unhydrated job refs are marked needs_human only for missing live state.
